mapper.select: SELECT a.id, u.id AS staff, u.name AS staffName, u.avatar AS staffAvatar, u.create_time AS staffRegisterTime, a.create_time, a.update_time, CASE a.type WHEN '1' THEN '签到' WHEN '2' THEN '请假' END AS type, CASE a.overtime WHEN '1' THEN '是' WHEN '2' THEN '否' END AS overtime, a.remark FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN attendance a ON u.id = a.staff WHERE a.id = #{id}
